Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Blackflame Trials]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — The Blackflame Trials consist of three separate trials: one for Enforcer technique, one for Striker technique, and one for Rulers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Entering the Blackflame Trials seals the script behind the participant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — The Blackflame Trials are located below the temple.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — The Blackflame Trials might test foot speed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — The Blackflame Trials have an exit covered by an aura barrier.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — The ringing of the Goldsign during the Endless Sword technique sounds like the gong from the Blackflame Trials.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — Running the Blackflame Trials alone is extremely expensive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — The Blackflame Trials were a training experience for Yerin.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — The Blackflame Trials are an event Yerin remembers.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
